2 ?05 0111101100 6
3 ?16 0101111001 6
4 ?27 0001011101 5

Constant
2 C 2 1111111111 a mismatch
2 C 2n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
2 I 0 0010100001 3 mismatch
2 I 0n 1101011110 7 mismatch

Unary 5
2 I 5 0101001101 5 mismatch
2 I 5n 1010110010 5 mismatch

Binary 05
2 AND 05 0000000001 1 mismatch
2 AND 05n 1111111110 9 mismatch
2 OR 05 0111101101 7 mismatch
2 OR 05n 1000010010 3 mismatch
2 XOR 05 0111101100 6 match 1/3
3 XOR 16 0101111001 6 match 2/3
4 XOR 27 0001011101 5 match 3/3
all match XOR 05 16 27
2 XOR 05n 1000010011 4 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 05 0010100000 2 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 05n 1101011111 8 mismatch
2 OR-NOT 05 1010110011 6 mismatch

0 I 3
1 I 4

7 I 5

Extending defaults
2 0111101100 6
3 0101111001 6
4 0001011101 5
Starting at I 4 increasing
I 5 0101001101 partial 1101011110 7
I 6 0100010100 partial 1110010010 5
I 7 1010111000 partial 0100011010 4
left 16
Starting at I 3 decreasing
I 2 1011100101 partial 0101000111 5
I 1 0001101101 partial 1011101011 7
I 0 0010100001 partial 1010110010 5
right 17
Choosing right
2 I 0
3 I 1
4 I 2

Selected
0 I 3
1 I 4
2 XOR 05
3 XOR 16
4 XOR 27
5 I 3
6 I 4
7 I 5

Applying to 00100100
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 3 = 0
1 I 4 = 0
2 XOR 05 = XOR(I 0,I 5) = XOR(0,1) = 1
3 XOR 16 = XOR(I 1,I 6) = XOR(0,0) = 0
4 XOR 27 = XOR(I 2,I 7) = XOR(1,0) = 1
5 I 3 = 0
6 I 4 = 0
7 I 5 = 1

\boxed{00101001}
